## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `infra:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Commit headers ≤ 72 chars and body lines ≤ 100 chars (long context goes in this PR description)
- [ ] Single logical commit (squashed if needed), rebased onto `staging`
- [ ] All content in English (code, comments, docs, commit messages)
- [ ] All files end with a trailing newline
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] `terraform fmt` ran (if Terraform changes)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (if applicable)
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes
